description:
A conservation biologist needs baseline climate data for the Galapagos Penguin habitat model. Using NASA Panoply and the datasets in ~/PanoplyData/, extract the 12-month climatology time series for both Air Temperature (air.mon.ltm.nc) and Precipitation Rate (prate.sfc.mon.ltm.nc) at the Galapagos Islands (0°, 270°E). Export the temperature data to ~/Documents/Galapagos/galapagos_temp.csv and the precipitation data to ~/Documents/Galapagos/galapagos_precip.csv. Based on the extracted data, create a summary report at ~/Documents/Galapagos/climate_summary.txt identifying the hottest and wettest months using the following format:

TARGET_LATITUDE: 0
TARGET_LONGITUDE: 270
HOTTEST_MONTH: [Month name]
WETTEST_MONTH: [Month name]
EXTRACTION_METHOD: Panoply CSV Export
